changes: ⚡ 98% fixed laggy UI for a much smoother experience
🔎 Explore UI improvements with artist screen, better song layout & quick Add Songs shortcut 🎵
💥 Added automatic crash reporting with detailed logs and one-tap Telegram sharing 📄
🎬 Major video player fixes for gestures, immersive mode, seek bar, PiP and Back Gesture 📺
🎬 Episodes panel now labels entries as Video 1, Video 2... in series order with Search + Watched/Unwatched filters
🕒 Fixed Recently Played sometimes not showing the video you just watched
🖼️ Floating (PiP) video window now has working Previous/Next buttons
🛑 Fixed floating (PiP) window's Close button not fully stopping playback
📂 Moved Playlists card to 2nd position in Explore
🎧 Fixed Audio Focus and Crossfade settings not working
🎵 Lyrics now download faster and continue scanning your entire library automatically ⚡
📚 Library now rescans for newly added songs every time the app starts 🎼
🏠 Recently Played cards can now expand/collapse with smoother snapping 🎶
🖼️ Fixed custom wallpaper refreshing and automatic cleanup of old wallpapers ✨
🐶 Dancing Dog Pet is now disabled by default and can be enabled from Settings ⚙️
💿 Fixed Mini Player album art rotation pausing correctly with playback 🎧
📦 Added native FFmpeg, VLC & MPV library support for future enhancements 🚀
🐞 Numerous bug fixes, UI polish and performance improvements 🛠️
🚀 App updated to Version 2.7.1 (Code 421)
✨ Added Dancing Pet 🐶
🎨 Fixed Tab Bar theme mismatch 🎯
🧩 Added Home Screen Widgets (Beta) 📱
🚀 Added Shortcut Launcher ⚡
⚡ Improved UI performance and reduced lag 🚄
🎞️ Disabled many unnecessary animations for a smoother experience 💨
🐞 Various bug fixes and stability improvements 🛠️
📦 App version bumped to 2.6.5 (Code 413)
🖼️ New: Manual Wallpaper Theme — pick any photo from your gallery as the app background 🎨
✨ Top tab bar and screen backgrounds turn transparent when a wallpaper is active 🪟
📱 Window status bar and navigation bar now fully transparent for a seamless wallpaper experience
⚙️ Settings > Appearance > Manual Wallpaper — toggle on/off and change image anytime
🌫️ New Blur slider (0–40dp) to manually control wallpaper softness
🌑 New Overlay Darkness slider to improve text/icon readability
💾 Wallpaper is copied into app-private storage for persistence without extra permissions
📦 App version bumped to 2.6.4 (Code 412)
🎥 Video player portrait/landscape button layout redesigned
🔒 Lock button moved to the bottom-left above the seek bar
🌍 Audio track & subtitle now auto-select based on device language
💾 Player action buttons now remember their state after reopening
🎨 Top navbar and status bar now match the selected theme
🖌️ Video player header now follows the app theme
⏱️ Song duration now appears below artist name on Home
📋 Added 3-dot menu to all songs with Play, Queue, Playlist, Share & Favorite
🖼️ MiniPlayer & Now Playing artwork no longer resets when paused
🐞 Fixed seek bar flashing/jumping while scrubbing
😴 Custom sleep timer now supports any minute value

📝 Updated update.json with the correct version code

🔕 Removed unnecessary 'App is up-to-date' toast
📚 Library tabs now auto-adjust to screen width
⚡ Added session-level flag to reduce repeated update checks
🔍 Manual update button always forces a fresh check
🎬 Added video playback support
⚡ Improved UI performance and stability
⚡ Fixed UI lag with snapshotFlow optimization
